# terrible_f5networks_f5_modules_bigip_profile_ftp (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against
- `name` (String) Specifies the name of the profile.

### Optional

- `allow_ftps` (Boolean) Allows explicit FTPS negotiation.
- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `description` (String) Description of the profile.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `inherit_parent_profile` (Boolean) Enables the FTP data channel to inherit the TCP profile used by the control channel. When `false`, the data channel uses FastL4 (BigProto) only.
- `log_profile` (String) Configures the ALG log profile that controls logging.
- `log_publisher` (String) Configures the log publisher that handles events logging for this profile.
- `parent` (String) Specifies the profile from which this profile inherits settings. When creating a new profile, if this parameter is not specified, the default is the system-supplied `ftp` profile.
- `partition` (String) Device partition to manage resources on.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `port` (Number) Specifies a service for the data channel port used for this FTP profile. Valid range of values is between `0` and `65535` inclusive.
- `security` (Boolean) Enables secure FTP traffic for the BIG-IP Application Security Manager. This option can only be used if the system is licensed for the BIG-IP ASM.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `state` (String) When `state` is `present`, ensures the ftp profile exists. When `state` is `absent`, ensures the ftp profile is removed.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `translate_extended` (Boolean) Translates RFC 2428 extended requests `EPSV` and `EPRT` to `PASV` and `PORT` when communicating with IPv4 servers. This option can only be used if the system is licensed for the BIG-IP Application Security Manager (ASM).
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
